## User Story

**As a** [type of user],
**I want** [some goal],
**so that** [some reason].

### Acceptance Criteria

```gherkin
Given [some context]
When [some action is taken]
Then [the outcome]
```

### Definition of Done
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Code coverage >= 95%
- [ ] Deployed to staging environment
